title: BRANCH_ISOLATION_HISTORICAL — squash-merge + branch-cleanup artifact
remediation: Confirm squash-merge cleanup-artifact via PR head_ref; set isolation_opt_out + reason only if work was genuinely direct-to-main.

title: CACHE_HITS_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_INACTIVE — Mechanism C captured, writer-path manual
remediation: Mid-workflow Reads captured but not yet persisted; log via scripts/log-cache-hit.py (v7.9 auto-writes).

title: BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode B — infra-only commit on non-feature branch
remediation: Move the infra-path commit onto a feature/chore branch (isolated worktree); Mode B ignores isolation_opt_out.

title: BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode C — state.json current_phase mutation off-branch
remediation: Work on the declared feature/chore branch, or set isolation_opt_out + reason when the branch field is legitimately stale.

title: ISOLATION_OPT_OUT_REASON_MISSING — opt-out without justification
remediation: Set isolation_opt_out_reason to a non-empty justification, or remove isolation_opt_out.

title: FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS — missing frontmatter on current_phase=complete
remediation: Populate the 7 required case-study frontmatter fields + kill_criteria_resolution before the complete-transition commit.

title: CACHE_HITS_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_DRIFT — empty cache_hits[] post-v6
remediation: Log Reads via scripts/log-cache-hit.py; features created_at < 2026-05-02 are auto-exempt.

title: TIER_TAG_LIKELY_INCORRECT — heuristic T1/T2/T3 mismatch (advisory permanent)
remediation: Verify the T1/T2/T3 tag; pin correct T1 values in case-study-t1-references.json or set tier_tags_present:false.

title: SCHEMA_DRIFT_LEGACY_CREATED — legacy `created` key
remediation: Rename the legacy `created` key to canonical `created_at` in state.json.

title: FRAMEWORK_VERSION_FORMAT — unprefixed numeric values
remediation: Set framework_version to canonical vX.Y format (e.g. v7.9).

title: STATE_OWNER_* (MISSING / INVALID / LOCATION_MISMATCH) — cross-repo schema
remediation: Set state_owner to ft2|fitme-story matching file location; reverse-sync mirrors use state_owner_sync_origin ending -reverse.

title: PR_CACHE_STALE — empty/stale cache → cascading false positives
remediation: Auto-refreshes via scripts/ensure-pr-cache-fresh.py; run make refresh-pr-cache if findings persist.

title: BROKEN_PR_CITATION — unresolved PR cite (graceful fallback when gh unavailable)
remediation: Fix the PR citation or add pr_citation_exempt frontmatter; skipped gracefully when gh is unavailable.

title: CASE_STUDY_MISSING_TIER_TAGS — forward-only on case studies dated >=2026-04-21
remediation: Add at least one T1/T2/T3 tier tag to the case study (dated on or after 2026-04-21).

title: PARTIAL_SHIP_TERMINAL — decision fork on completion
remediation: Remove partial_ship:true, or downgrade current_phase + add partial_ship_terminal_disposition.

title: CASE_STUDY_MISSING_FIELDS — required frontmatter validation
remediation: Fill the required frontmatter fields, or apply the appropriate case_study_type exemption.

title: CU_V2_INVALID — schema-only check (presence, not magnitude)
remediation: Fix cu_v2 schema: 4 factors in [0,1], total within 0.01 of sum, valid tier_class.

title: STATE_NO_CASE_STUDY_LINK — terminal phase requires case_study or exemption
remediation: Add case_study / parent_case_study path, or case_study_type:no_case_study_required + reason.

title: MECHANISM_C_SHIP_DATE auto-exemption
remediation: No action — gates auto-exempt features with created_at < 2026-05-02.

title: GATE_COVERAGE_ZERO — meta-check for silent-pass detection
remediation: Diagnose root cause (predicate too strict / schema drift / never-fires-by-design); fix or document advisory-permanent.

title: case_study_type exemption tags — bypass scope
remediation: Apply the correct case_study_type tag + case_study_exempt_reason; framework versions cannot use framework_meta_retroactive post-v7.9.

title: v7.5 pipeline regression test decay — fixture rot
remediation: Update scripts/tests/test-v7-5-pipeline.sh fixtures to satisfy new required gates; run make test-v7-5-pipeline.

title: .gitignore blocks Mechanism A / Mechanism C remote-agent visibility
remediation: Commit periodic gate-coverage / session-ledger snapshots to non-gitignored paths so remote agents can audit.

title: SSH signing requires loaded agent before headless commits
remediation: Run ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 before headless commits; verify with ssh-add -l.

title: Publish verbatim, then remediate
remediation: Never silently rewrite published artifacts; add a Correction Note / §99 addendum instead.

title: Check CI before local-build panic
remediation: Check CI status (gh run list) before deep local-build debugging.

title: No auto-merge without explicit approval
remediation: Never auto-merge; surface PR + checks and wait for explicit approval.

title: No destructive operations without approval
remediation: Never delete branches/worktrees/files or force-push without explicit approval; list + propose first.

title: Measurement case-study impartiality
remediation: Backfill/exempt measurement adoption all-or-none; document any exemption explicitly.

title: Approval gates are multi-part
remediation: Treat each destructive step as a separate approval; prior approval doesn't carry over.

title: External audit status is a UI marker
remediation: Treat the audit-status UI marker as a signal, not a merge gate.

title: Branch drift from concurrent-session git checkout collision
remediation: If the branch-drift alert fires, stop, stash/cherry-pick, and git checkout the expected branch (W9 playbook).

title: Stale [gone] branches + orphan worktrees surfaced by daily-checkpoint
remediation: Clean stale [gone] branches / orphan worktrees via commit-commands:clean_gone after confirming merge.

title: Incomplete PR cache (one of two expected repos absent)
remediation: Run make refresh-pr-cache to repopulate all expected repos; per-repo completeness check auto-detects.

title: vercel env pull returns empty values for Sensitive vars
remediation: Sensitive Vercel vars pull empty; use the Development env variant or a non-Sensitive CLI admin var.

title: Upstash KV_* vs UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_* naming asymmetry
remediation: Alias UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_* to KV_REST_API_*, or read either name in code.

title: Code Connect figma.connect() rejects page frames as targets
remediation: Code Connect targets must be components/component-sets; convert page frames or map leaf components only.

title: MDX `<digit` / `<non-letter` breaks page rendering
remediation: Escape/avoid `<digit` in MDX (use 'under 5 min', <, or a code-span) to keep prerender green.

title: Contract-boundary tests must sample from the canonical producer
remediation: Sample cross-repo test fixtures from the canonical producer; normalize at parse with a nullish fallback.

title: Stale-base branches — cherry-pick onto fresh main is ground truth
remediation: For stale-base branches, cherry-pick onto fresh origin/main to find ground truth before merging.

title: Default-URL OG image silent-404
remediation: Point the default OG image URL at the Next.js convention route; unit-test that the URL resolves.

title: Env-var trailing newline corrupts runtime string
remediation: Trim string env vars at the boundary (process.env.X?.trim()) to strip trailing newlines.

title: Stale-session-state inventory drift
remediation: Run make freshness-check before any 'what's open' inventory or before editing recently-shipped files.

title: Swift String.contains("\n") misses CRLF graphemes — scan unicodeScalars
remediation: Scan unicodeScalars (not graphemes) for ASCII control chars like CR/LF in Swift.

title: Swift type-checker timeout on heterogeneous array literals >20 elements
remediation: Pre-compute each cell as a String local; use .map { String($0) } closure form for Optionals.

title: AnalyticsService.logEvent is private — callers must use a log* method
remediation: logEvent is private — add a named log* method, or use #if DEBUG print for can't-happen paths.

title: pbxproj merge conflicts from concurrent PRs at same group/sources position
remediation: Resolve pbxproj merge conflicts additively — keep all branches' distinct PBXBuildFile/FileReference entries.

title: @MainActor propagates to statics — test class must be @MainActor
remediation: Mark test classes that exercise @MainActor types (incl. their statics) with @MainActor.

title: Two workflows sharing name: clash in github.workflow concurrency groups
remediation: Give each workflow a hardcoded concurrency-group prefix, not ${{ github.workflow }}, when names collide.

title: make preflight enhancement_parent false-positive
remediation: enhancement_parent mis-aims at the enhancement's own prd.md; verify against state.json::parent_feature (now fixed).

title: Local xcodebuild blocked by CoreSimulator out-of-date (Mac restart required)
remediation: Local xcodebuild CoreSimulator-out-of-date needs a Mac restart; fall back to swiftc -parse + CI.
